arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours: Man United forward leaves on loan, Andre Silva in advanced talks over West Ham move
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Ethan Wheatley to Walsall, Andre Silva to West Ham United and an update on Beto's future at Everton.

arts.ttl: William Saliba injury: Progress and potential return date
arts.sum: The latest injury news on Arsenal defender William Saliba, including his potential return date.

arts.ttl: Sverre Nypan has already named transfer dream as Arsenal battle Premier League rivals
arts.sum: Whilst it was a striker signing Arteta spoke of specifically, the latest exciting update to drop in North London was Arsenal's place in the battle for Norwegian talent Sverre Nypan . football.london says: When a talent like Nypan comes along, it is time to forget what priorities Arsenal may have in the market and go all-out for the talent.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news as Mikel Arteta sent £60m message amid Wolves Premier League postponement talk
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has effectively given the Arsenal hierarchy the green light to complete a deal this month, before the January transfer window closes. Losing him in the January transfer window would not be ideal, but they have set a price tag for him, should anyone be interested in signing him.

arts.ttl: Wolves vs Arsenal simulated to get a score prediction for Premier League clash
arts.sum: We predict that Arsenal could set up in a 4-3-3 formation, with their line-up as follows: Raya; Timber, Kiwior, Gabriel, Zinchenko; Partey, Rice, Odegaard; Martinelli, Havertz, Trossard. Arsenal gave up a 2-0 lead to draw 2-2 against Aston Villa in their last Premier League outing, leaving the Gunners six points behind leaders Liverpool who have a game in hand.

arts.ttl: Full Arsenal squad available for Wolves as six players ruled out after fresh injury blow
arts.sum: The Gunners were dealt another injury blow in midweek, with Myles Lewis-Skelly suffering from a hamstring issue that forced him to miss the win over Zagreb. Unavailable : Bukayo Saka, William Saliba, Myles Lewis-Skelly, Ben White, Takehiro Tomiyasu, Gabriel Jesus.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star Gabriel Jesus fires two-word message and clear injury update after huge announcement
arts.sum: It comes just three days after Jesus posted from hospital after having surgery on his knee. On Friday, Jesus and his wife posted videos of their gender reveal for their second child.

arts.ttl: How to watch Wolves vs Arsenal - US TV channel, Premier League live stream details, kick off time - football.london
arts.sum: Arsenal need to get back to winning ways in the Premier League after their frustrating draw to Aston Villa last weekend let Liverpool extend their lead at the top of the table. Wolves vs Arsenal is scheduled to kick off at 3pm on Saturday, January 25.

arts.ttl: Benjamin Sesko has already made Arsenal transfer 'decision' amid Chelsea and Man United link
arts.sum: Sesko was reported to have a €65million (£55million) release clause in his contract at Leipzig - until he signed a new deal with the Bundesliga that, initially, ended interest from rival clubs, including Arsenal . Mikel Arteta has recently spoke about Arsenal's need to sign a new striker.

arts.ttl: Arsenal drop Wolves team news hints early after huge Matheus Cunha announcement
arts.sum: It was Jorginho's first appearance since the Man United tie, but Sterling has featured in the Gunners' last four matches after returning from injury. Arsenal have hinted that manager Mikel Arteta will select much of the midfield that beat Dinamo Zagreb when they face Wolverhampton Wanderers .
